scope_note: QA G-Equivariant CNN Structural Cert family [247]: closed-form algebraic certification of the Cohen-Welling rotation index map and orbit-family partition. C1 verifies the A1 residue bijection phi(b)=b mod n on {1,...,n}; C2 exhaustively checks phi(qa_step(b1,b2,n))=(phi(b1)+phi(b2)) mod n at n=9 and n=24; C3 exhaustively partitions the n=9 single-generator orbits into singularity/satellite/cosmos with zero exceptions; C4 records the static equation correspondence Eq. 10 lifting = observer IN, Eq. 11 G-correlation = QA-layer resonance, §6.3 coset pooling = observer OUT. Precision nuance (not a fabrication): the paper's own section heading covering both Eq. 10 and 11 is 'G-Equivariant correlation'; the word 'lifting' does not appear in this 2016 paper naming Eq. 10 specifically -- it became standard terminology in later G-CNN/steerable-CNN literature for this exact operation.
